name: No witnesses to my ladder fall at work, can I still get comp?
description: Yes, testimony + evidence enough—no witnesses needed.

mainEntity.name: No witnesses to my ladder fall at work, can I still get comp?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, testimony + evidence enough—no witnesses needed.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Yes, your credible testimony + medicals suffice**; circumstantial evidence like ladder state helps.[2][7]

Self-reported falls common in comp.

- Photos, video if available.
- Co-worker recollections later.

Insurers challenge solos—lawyers counter.
